result.summary: Auth0 exposes four tenant-scoped HTTP APIs for developers—the Authentication API, Management API, My Account API, and My Organization API—plus the Auth0 CLI and a public Auth0 Docs MCP server; API access is generally authenticated with Auth0-issued OAuth/OIDC tokens or application credentials (client ID with secret/assertion, depending on the flow), while the docs MCP server is public.

auth0_mgmt_token.label: Management API access token
auth0_mgmt_token.setup: Create an Auth0 application and request a Management API token for audience `https://{yourDomain}/api/v2/` with the scopes your integration needs, following [Management API Access Tokens](https://auth0.com/docs/secure/tokens/access-tokens/management-api-access-tokens). For interactive use with the CLI, you can also run `auth0 login` or `auth0 login --domain <your-domain> --client-id <client-id> --client-secret <client-secret>` as documented in [Auth0 CLI](https://auth0.com/docs/deploy-monitor/auth0-cli).

auth0_app_client.label: Auth0 application credentials
auth0_app_client.setup: In the [Auth0 Dashboard Applications page](https://manage.auth0.com/#/applications), create or open an application to get its `client_id`. For confidential apps, also obtain its `client_secret` or configure private key JWT / mTLS as described in [Authentication API](https://auth0.com/docs/api/authentication). Use the app's token endpoint authentication method that matches your flow.

variables.name: tenantDomain
variables.description: Auth0 tenant domain, e.g. `{TENANT}.auth0.com` or a custom domain when configured.

variables.name: yourDomain
variables.resolveFrom: Auth0 tenant domain or custom domain
variables.description: Canonical Auth0 domain or configured custom domain; docs state all Authentication API URLs use `https://{yourDomain}`.

variables.name: yourDomain
variables.resolveFrom: Auth0 tenant domain or custom domain
variables.description: Use the same canonical Auth0 domain or custom domain throughout token issuance and API calls.

variables.name: tenantDomain
variables.resolveFrom: Auth0 tenant domain or custom domain
variables.description: Canonical Auth0 domain or custom domain; spec also lists `https://{tenantDomain}/my-org` as an alternate server URL.
